description: CompositionBeige kurta made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves, Boat neck with beige piping and has a printed upper chest panel with sequinsFittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry in shadeHot iron inside outEthnic is back with a bang with this beige kurta from w!
